name: SimpleErrorManager
description: X-Macro based error tracking for Arduino / ESP32. Track up to 256 error codes in a compact 32-byte bitmask, with optional mercy (debounce) times, acknowledge flags and optional human-readable names/info strings. Error codes are defined per project in a .def file.
keywords: error, error-handling, x-macro, esp32, arduino, bitmask, diagnostics
